# Matrix Provider

Manage Matrix rooms, spaces, membership, and power levels from a user account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    matrix = {
      source  = "raspbeguy/matrix"
      version = "~> 0.1"
    }
  }
}

provider "matrix" {
  homeserver_url = "https://matrix.example.com"
  # access_token = "syt_…"   # prefer MATRIX_ACCESS_TOKEN env var
  # user_id      = "@tf:matrix.example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `access_token` (String, Sensitive) Access token for the Matrix user. Falls back to MATRIX_ACCESS_TOKEN.
- `homeserver_url` (String) Base URL of the homeserver (e.g. https://matrix.org). Falls back to MATRIX_HOMESERVER_URL.
- `request_timeout` (String) Per-request timeout as a Go duration string (e.g. "30s"). Default: 30s.
- `user_id` (String) Full Matrix user ID (e.g. @alice:matrix.org). Falls back to MATRIX_USER_ID. If omitted, derived via /whoami.
